extra_trees.estimator_repr:
Pipeline(steps=[('features', TitanicFeatureBuilder()),
                ('preprocess',
                 ColumnTransformer(transformers=[('num',
                                                  SimpleImputer(strategy='median'),
                                                  ['Age', 'Fare',
                                                   'FarePerPerson',
                                                   'FamilySize', 'SibSp',
                                                   'Parch', 'NameLength',
                                                   'TicketGroupSize',
                                                   'SurnameGroupSize',
                                                   'PclassNum']),
                                                 ('cat',
                                                  Pipeline(steps=[('imputer',
                                                                   SimpleImputer(strategy='most_frequent')),
                                                                  ('onehot',
                                                                   One...
                                                  ['Sex', 'Embarked', 'Pclass',
                                                   'Title', 'CabinDeck',
                                                   'TicketPrefix',
                                                   'FamilyLabel', 'AgeBand',
                                                   'FareBand', 'SexPclass',
                                                   'TitlePclass']),
                                                 ('bin', 'passthrough',
                                                  ['IsAlone', 'CabinKnown',
                                                   'AgeMissing', 'FareMissing',
                                                   'EmbarkedMissing', 'IsChild',
                                                   'IsMother'])])),
                ('model',
                 ExtraTreesClassifier(min_samples_leaf=2, min_samples_split=6,
                                      n_estimators=1200, n_jobs=1,
                                      random_state=42))])
extra_trees.notes: High-variance tree ensemble on one-hot engineered features.

hist_gradient_boosting.estimator_repr:
Pipeline(steps=[('features', TitanicFeatureBuilder()),
                ('preprocess',
                 ColumnTransformer(transformers=[('num',
                                                  SimpleImputer(strategy='median'),
                                                  ['Age', 'Fare',
                                                   'FarePerPerson',
                                                   'FamilySize', 'SibSp',
                                                   'Parch', 'NameLength',
                                                   'TicketGroupSize',
                                                   'SurnameGroupSize',
                                                   'PclassNum']),
                                                 ('cat',
                                                  Pipeline(steps=[('imputer',
                                                                   SimpleImputer(strategy='most_frequent')),
                                                                  ('ordinal',
                                                                   Or...
                                                   'Title', 'CabinDeck',
                                                   'TicketPrefix',
                                                   'FamilyLabel', 'AgeBand',
                                                   'FareBand', 'SexPclass',
                                                   'TitlePclass']),
                                                 ('bin', 'passthrough',
                                                  ['IsAlone', 'CabinKnown',
                                                   'AgeMissing', 'FareMissing',
                                                   'EmbarkedMissing', 'IsChild',
                                                   'IsMother'])])),
                ('model',
                 HistGradientBoostingClassifier(l2_regularization=0.2,
                                                learning_rate=0.04, max_depth=3,
                                                max_iter=300,
                                                min_samples_leaf=9,
                                                random_state=42))])
hist_gradient_boosting.notes: Histogram gradient boosting with ordinal-encoded categories.

logistic.estimator_repr:
Pipeline(steps=[('features', TitanicFeatureBuilder()),
                ('preprocess',
                 ColumnTransformer(transformers=[('num',
                                                  Pipeline(steps=[('imputer',
                                                                   SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
                                                                  ('scaler',
                                                                   StandardScaler())]),
                                                  ['Age', 'Fare',
                                                   'FarePerPerson',
                                                   'FamilySize', 'SibSp',
                                                   'Parch', 'NameLength',
                                                   'TicketGroupSize',
                                                   'SurnameGroupSize',
                                                   'PclassNum']),
                                                 ('cat',
                                                  Pipeline(steps=[('imput...
                                                                   OneHotEncoder(handle_unknown='ignore'))]),
                                                  ['Sex', 'Embarked', 'Pclass',
                                                   'Title', 'CabinDeck',
                                                   'TicketPrefix',
                                                   'FamilyLabel', 'AgeBand',
                                                   'FareBand', 'SexPclass',
                                                   'TitlePclass']),
                                                 ('bin', 'passthrough',
                                                  ['IsAlone', 'CabinKnown',
                                                   'AgeMissing', 'FareMissing',
                                                   'EmbarkedMissing', 'IsChild',
                                                   'IsMother'])])),
                ('model',
                 LogisticRegression(C=0.35, max_iter=4000, random_state=42,
                                    solver='liblinear'))])
logistic.notes: Scaled linear baseline with engineered features.

                                                   'Parch', 'NameLength',
                                                   'TicketGroupSize',
                                                   'SurnameGroupSize',
                                                   'PclassNum']),
                                                 ('cat',
                                                  Pipeline(steps=[('imput...
                                                  ['Sex', 'Embarked', 'Pclass',
                                                   'Title', 'CabinDeck',
                                                   'TicketPrefix',
                                                   'FamilyLabel', 'AgeBand',
                                                   'FareBand', 'SexPclass',
                                                   'TitlePclass']),
                                                 ('bin', 'passthrough',
                                                  ['IsAlone', 'CabinKnown',
                                                   'AgeMissing', 'FareMissing',

                ('model',

                                    solver='liblinear'))])
logistic_balanced.notes: Class-balanced logistic variant for recall on the minority class.

soft_vote_core.estimator_repr:
VotingClassifier(estimators=[('lr',
                              Pipeline(steps=[('features',
                                               TitanicFeatureBuilder()),
                                              ('preprocess',
                                               ColumnTransformer(transformers=[('num',
                                                                                Pipeline(steps=[('imputer',
                                                                                                 SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
                                                                                                ('scaler',
                                                                                                 StandardScaler())]),
                                                                                ['Age',
                                                                                 'Fare',
                                                                                 'FarePerPerson',
                                                                                 'FamilySize',
                                                                                 'SibSp',
                                                                                 'Parch',
                                                                                 'NameLength',
                                                                                 'TicketGroupSize',
                                                                                 'SurnameGroupSize',
                                                                                 'PclassNu...
                                                                                 'AgeBand',
                                                                                 'FareBand',
                                                                                 'SexPclass',
                                                                                 'TitlePclass']),
                                                                               ('bin',
                                                                                'passthrough',
                                                                                ['IsAlone',
                                                                                 'CabinKnown',
                                                                                 'AgeMissing',
                                                                                 'FareMissing',
                                                                                 'EmbarkedMissing',
                                                                                 'IsChild',
                                                                                 'IsMother'])])),
                                              ('model',
                                               HistGradientBoostingClassifier(l2_regularization=0.2,
                                                                              learning_rate=0.04,
                                                                              max_depth=3,
                                                                              max_iter=300,
                                                                              min_samples_leaf=9,
                                                                              random_state=42))]))],
                 n_jobs=1, voting='soft', weights=[2, 3, 3])
soft_vote_core.notes: Soft vote of logistic, extra trees, and gradient boosting.

                                                                                 'PclassNu...
                                                                                                 OneHotEncoder(handle_unknown='ignore'))]),
                                                                                ['Sex',

                                                                                 'TicketPrefix',
